diagrams.title: Hierarchical Directory Structure
diagrams.description: Tree diagram showing root directory with branches for system, users, and applications, each containing subdirectories and files
diagrams.purpose: Understanding tree-structured directory organization and path resolution

diagrams.title: Hash Table Directory Implementation
diagrams.description: Diagram showing hash function converting file names to bucket indexes, with chained entries for collision handling
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how hash tables enable fast O(1) directory lookups
